positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_tom_is_eastern
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    is_type(X0,ocellated) | is_type(X0,osceola) | is_type(X0,goulds) | is_type(X0,merriams) | is_type(X0,rio_grande) | is_type(X0,eastern) | ~is_wild_turkey(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~is_type(tom,osceola)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~is_type(tom,merriams)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~is_type(tom,goulds)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    is_wild_turkey(tom)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~is_type(tom,rio_grande)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~is_type(tom,eastern)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all groundings,
    whenever is_type(X0,eastern) | is_type(X0,osceola) | is_type(X0,goulds) | is_type(X0,merriams) | is_type(X0,rio_grande) | is_type(X0,ocellated) is true, set is_wild_turkey(X0) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

8. ~is_type(tom,eastern) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~is_type(tom,eastern) [negated conjecture 8]
10. is_type(tom,eastern) [flattening 9]
14. ~is_type(tom,eastern) [cnf transformation 1]
21. is_type(tom,eastern) [cnf transformation 10]
22. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,21]
